skincare.evening_routine: Uses azelaic acid + retinol together in evening routine with proper wait times (30-60 min between azelaic and retinol, 10-30 min before moisturizer). Previously alternated them but skin tolerates combination well. Products: Bioderma oil cleanser, CeraVe hydrating cleanser, azelaic acid 10%, CeraVe retinol serum, CeraVe moisturizing cream
